_comment: Example Codex CLI hooks (verified against codex-cli 0.141.0). install.ps1 writes this to ~/.codex/hooks.json and points ~/.codex/config.toml at it via: hooks = "hooks.json". Codex event enum (from the binary): PreToolUse, PermissionRequest, PostToolUse, PreCompact, PostCompact, SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, SubagentStart, SubagentStop, Stop. There is NO dedicated 'error' event, so error is driven manually / by the UI. After install, run `codex` once and TRUST the hooks when prompted ('Hooks need review').
